sourceRef: tip:Four numbers to know by heart

slides.headline: Master VA Certifications with VASCO
slides.body: Empower your team with automated certifications and compliance tracking.

slides.headline: Streamline Certification Requests
slides.body: Easily submit and track VA certification requests in one platform.

slides.headline: Effortless Compliance
slides.body: Stay compliant with our comprehensive tracking system.

slides.headline: Simplified Certifications
slides.body: Simplify the certification process for your students.

slides.headline: Comprehensive Support
slides.body: Get the support you need for student veterans.

slides.headline: Track Student Progress
slides.body: Monitor student certification progress in real-time.

outline.caption: Master VA certification processes with VASCO. Get streamlined certification requests, effortless compliance, simplified student support, and real-time tracking. Ready to take the next step? Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is the last one, which is more of a call to action rather than a clear takeaway. A stronger takeaway could be included to make it more impactful.
